title: ZZTV7
technique: Large segmented color fields and scattered CP437 marks create neon abstract lettering and motion.
composition: Asymmetric diagonal bands cross a dark field, with bright fragments concentrated near the upper half.
quality: Strong high-energy identity: saturated color is organized into broad directional sweeps rather than noise.
summary: Neon abstract lettering: saturated segmented bands sweep diagonally across a black field.
